description: 2 Pairs Ladies Thermal Fleece Knee High or Over Knee Socks. These thermal fleece garments are insulated to keep your legs warm and cosy. By using the finest quality brushed polyester yarns, they create a thermal barrier in order to keep the heat in and the cold out. The tog rating means the garments have approximately 3x more resistance against chill factor than normal standard garments. Extra thick yarn for more heat retention. Deep cushioning to trap more heat. Super brushed inner giving a super soft and exceptionally warm feel. Over knee socks and 0.5 tog knee highs are 140 Denier. 4.9 tog knee high socks are 200 Denier.
